title: olearia pachycephala
intro: Olearia pachycephala, also known as the woolly daisy bush, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Olearia pachycephala include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The herbal preparations of Olearia pachycephala typically involve the leaves and flowers being dried and then made into teas, infusions, or capsules for medicinal use.
